name: Heart
description: Plump hearts dotting the grid, re-colouring on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 96%, 8% 52%, 8% 26%, 28% 8%, 50% 24%, 72% 8%, 92% 26%, 92% 52%); clip-path: polygon(50% 96%, 8% 52%, 8% 26%, 28% 8%, 50% 24%, 72% 8%, 92% 26%, 92% 52%); opacity: @rand(0.8, 1); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
